_readme: Copy this to config.json and fill in your values. Keys starting with _ are comments.

whatsapp._info: Free via CallMeBot. Send 'I allow callmebot to send me messages' to +34 644 54 29 97 on WhatsApp to get your API key.

ntfy._info: Free push notifications. Install ntfy app, subscribe to your topic.

routes.label: Bucharest → Auckland (Feb–Mar 2027)
routes._flexibility_note: Tries target-2, target, target+2 night durations per departure date
routes._samples_note: Number of departure dates sampled per daily run, spread evenly across the window
routes._airlines_note: List of preferred airline IATA codes e.g. ['TK', 'QR']. Empty = no preference.
routes._airline_mode_note: off = show all, no flagging | soft = show all, flag matching with 🏷️ | hard = only show flights with at least one preferred airline leg
routes._departure_days_note: Weekdays to depart on e.g. ['wednesday','thursday','friday']. Empty = any day.
routes._return_days_note: Weekdays to return on e.g. ['sunday','monday']. Empty = any day within flexibility window.
routes._stopovers_note: Maximum number of stops. Remove or set null to allow any.
routes._layover_note: Max single layover duration in hours. Remove or set null to allow any.
routes._bags_note: Checked bags to include in price filter (0, 1, or 2). Long-haul usually includes bags.

departure_window._mode_note: hard = exclude flights outside window | soft = show all but flag preferred ones with ⭐

routes._price_note: Sends an immediate alert when price drops below this. Set to null to disable.

daily._info: Sends every day if no max_price_alert set. If threshold is set, only when price is below it.

price_alert._info: Fires immediately when price drops below max_price_alert. Max once per day.

weekly_summary._days: monday | tuesday | wednesday | thursday | friday | saturday | sunday

channels._info: Per-route channel overrides. false = disable this channel for this route only.
channels._ntfy_topic_note: Optional: per-route ntfy topic. Leave empty to use global topic.
